category_sources: source_facts.description says live audio streamer; official GitHub README says DarkIce records audio, encodes it, and sends it to a streaming server.
display_name_sources: source_facts.name is darkice; official GitHub README and homepage use DarkIce.
docs_sources: Official GitHub README is an official documentation fallback for the current development repository.
Official GitHub README points users to the DarkIce website and describes the project; source_facts.homepage is http://www.darkice.org/.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo already provides https://github.com/rafael2k/darkice; per instruction repo is returned as null and not second-guessed.
tags_sources: Official GitHub README says DarkIce records audio from an audio interface, encodes it, and sends it to a streaming server.
source_facts.description says live audio streamer and current_curation.tags includes cli.
